laws.title: Tennessee Minimum Wage — Federal Rate ($7.25/hr)
laws.summary: Tennessee has no state minimum wage law — the federal $7.25/hour applies. Tennessee is a right-to-work state. Local governments cannot set their own minimum wages. Tennessee has limited state-specific employment obligations beyond federal law.
compliance_actions: Tennessee has no state paid sick leave or family leave — FMLA is the applicable law
Ensure all required federal employment posters are displayed at Tennessee worksites

laws.title: Tennessee Human Rights Act — Discrimination Protections
laws.summary: The Tennessee Human Rights Act (THRA) prohibits employment discrimination based on race, creed, color, religion, sex, age, and national origin. It applies to employers with 8+ employees — a lower threshold than Title VII (15+ employees). Unlike some states, Tennessee does not include sexual orientation or gender identity as protected classes under state law.
compliance_actions: Ensure anti-discrimination policies reference both Title VII and the THRA
Note: Federal law (Bostock v. Clayton County) protects LGBTQ+ employees from discrimination under Title VII — ensure your policies reflect this even though THRA does not independently protect them
